attributes.name: Cards Grid Layout and Functionality Overview
attributes.summary: The CardsGrid component provides an interactive and flexible visual interface for displaying collections of cards in grid or list formats. Its primary purpose is to enable users to browse, filter, sort, and create new cards within a defined realm. It supports different view options and filters, including highlighting specific cards and displaying all available cards, and integrates realm subscription capabilities to dynamically update displayed data. Designed for use within a card-based application environment, it facilitates card management and presentation in a user-configurable grid layout.
